Staff reminders

Remember to submit timesheets by Friday. Parking lot resurfacing starts Monday,
use the side entrance. Staff meeting moved to 3:30pm.

---

Grade 2 unit — Animals and Sounds

This unit is designed for Grade 2. Focus: animal names and the sounds they
make, simple present tense ("the dog barks"). CEFR target: designed to target
A1+ in listening.

---

Also: the printer on the second floor is out of toner again.
